codeSystems.name: ZimCountryCS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Country (Nationality) Code System
codeSystems.description: Countries used for citizenship/nationality in Zimbabwe. Codes are aligned with ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Defined locally so terminology validation does not depend on ISO 3166 server support; extend as needed.

codeSystems.name: ZimFacilityTypeCS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Health Facility Type Code System
codeSystems.description: Tiers of health facility in the Zimbabwe public health system.

codeSystems.name: ZimProvinceCS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Province Code System
codeSystems.description: The ten provinces of Zimbabwe. The 'facilityCode' property gives the two-digit province number (01-10) used as the province segment of a national facility code. Concept codes are also aligned with ISO 3166-2:ZW subdivisions (e.g. HA = ZW-HA).
